requirement_topic.en: PLN Grid Connection and ESDM Storage / Electricity Rules

summary.en: A grid-connected Indonesian BESS project is usually reviewed as an electricity project, not only as imported equipment. PLN interconnection requirements, the applicable grid code, protection settings, metering, dispatch interface, commissioning tests, and ESDM licensing or project rules can control whether the BESS may be energized. Storage treatment may vary by project role, such as generation support, renewable integration, captive power, utility procurement, or customer-side installation.
summary.zh: 印尼并网BESS项目通常作为电力项目审查，而不仅是进口设备。PLN并网要求、适用电网规则、保护定值、计量、调度接口、调试测试以及ESDM许可或项目规则，可能决定BESS能否送电。储能的处理可能因项目角色而异，例如发电侧支撑、可再生能源并网、自备电力、公用事业采购或用户侧安装。
summary.zht: 印尼併網BESS項目通常作為電力項目審查，而不僅是進口設備。PLN併網要求、適用電網規則、保護定值、計量、調度介面、調試測試以及ESDM許可或項目規則，可能決定BESS能否送電。儲能的處理可能因項目角色而異，例如發電側支撐、可再生能源併網、自備電力、公用事業採購或用戶側安裝。

standards_or_laws: PLN interconnection and technical approval requirements for the project
Applicable Indonesian grid code and protection, metering, and commissioning requirements
ESDM electricity licensing, renewable-energy, and project rules where storage is part of the permitted activity

summary.en: China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 evidence helps show battery safety, but PLN and ESDM review will also need site-specific electrical studies, grid models, protection settings, PCS behavior, communications, commissioning plans, and local permit evidence.
summary.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023证据有助于证明电池安全，但PLN和ESDM审查还需要场站特定电气研究、电网模型、保护定值、PCS行为、通信、调试计划和本地许可证据。
summary.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023證據有助於證明電池安全，但PLN和ESDM審查還需要場站特定電氣研究、電網模型、保護定值、PCS行為、通信、調試計劃和本地許可證據。

gap.en: The gap is interconnection approval. Exporters should prepare single-line diagrams, grid studies, PCS certificates or test reports, frequency and voltage ride-through behavior where required, protection coordination, SCADA or EMS interface details, commissioning procedures, and Bahasa Indonesia project documents for PLN, ESDM, the owner, and the EPC.
gap.zh: 差距在于并网批准。出口商应准备一次接线图、电网研究、PCS证书或测试报告、适用时的频率和电压穿越行为、保护配合、SCADA或EMS接口细节、调试程序以及印尼语项目文件，供PLN、ESDM、业主和EPC审查。
gap.zht: 差距在於併網批准。出口商應準備一次接線圖、電網研究、PCS證書或測試報告、適用時的頻率和電壓穿越行為、保護配合、SCADA或EMS介面細節、調試程序以及印尼語項目文件，供PLN、ESDM、業主和EPC審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected projects where PLN interconnection approval, grid-code compliance, ESDM licensing, or project approval applies; requirements are project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: China battery and BESS GB/GB-T evidence does not replace Indonesian PLN interconnection approval or ESDM project licensing

source.publisher: Kementerian Energi dan Sumber Daya Mineral Republik Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Indonesian grid connection as a separate PLN and ESDM approval workstream. Battery safety reports are necessary evidence but not a substitute for interconnection and project licensing review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将印尼并网作为独立的PLN和ESDM审批工作流处理。电池安全报告是必要证据，但不能替代并网和项目许可审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將印尼併網作為獨立的PLN和ESDM審批工作流處理。電池安全報告是必要證據，但不能替代併網和項目許可審查。
